reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención del playero y en el Servicompras, pese a que había mucho movimiento de gente (fin de semana largo).

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beach attendant and at the convenience store, despite the high volume of people (long weekend).

reviews.comment:
tramo de trelew a comodoro Rivadavia es interminable ... lo bueno este estación de servicio tiene WiFi  gratis

(Translated by Google)
The stretch from Trelew to Comodoro Rivadavia is endless... the good thing is this gas station has free WiFi

(Translated by Google)
The only place to refuel between Sarmiento and Trek (Route 3). The shop is a bit limited.

reviews.comment:
Cada vez que quiero renunciar al ACA porque somos privilegiados solo para pagar cuota y seguro, me encuentro alguna estación en el medio de la nada como  esta que le da vida a una pequeña población patagonica

(Translated by Google)
Every time I want to quit the ACA because we are privileged only to pay fees and insurance, I find a station in the middle of nowhere like this one that gives life to a small Patagonian town.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXNjluem9RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Parada casi obligado, buena atención y agradable lugar, relajante y patagónico!!!

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop, great service and a pleasant, relaxing, and Patagonian place!
